attributes.action: Force the prime minister to answer questions at PMQ's
attributes.additional_details: It's clear that MPs and the general public are fed up with the PM's refusal to answer questions put to him at PMQ's and that the Speaker has admitted that he is powerless to make him answer .
attributes.background: To change the ruling to allow the Speaker to compell the Prime Minister to answer opposition questions at PMQ's

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Introduce standards for answers to PMQs to be enforced by the Speaker
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/762566
